meta_description: Copper is a popular and attractive metal found in a broad range of thermal and electrical applications. Order copper machined parts today.

sections.heading: Copper CNC Machining Service
sections.text: Copper CNC Machining Service Copper is a popular and attractive metal commonly found in electrical applications due to its conductivity. Get Copper CNC Machined Parts

sections.heading: What is Copper?
sections.text: What is Copper? Copper is a metal that is corrosion-resistant, extremely electrically conductive, and highly ductile. Its glossy orange-reddish appearance is instantly recognizable, and the metal looks attractive even when it goes through a natural oxidation process that forms a bluish-green coating called patina in response to its environment. Note, however, that copper weldability is considered moderate to poor. We offer two types of copper via our CNC machining service: Copper 101 : A 99.99% pure copper alloy with excellent electrical and thermal conductivity, high corrosion resistance, ductility, and impact strength. Copper 110 (via Protolabs Network ): 99.90% copper alloy used in elect...

sections.heading: Applications for Copper CNC Machining
sections.text: Applications for Copper CNC Machining Copper is the go-to material for the industries and applications below. Its thermal and electrical conductivity make it a natural choice for high power electrical applications, such as the magnetrons embedded in microwave ovens. With the boom in electronic vehicles (EVs), the need for copper wiring has also increased. Of course, everything from your television to your daily appliances needs copper and its ductility makes it easy to maneuver it through tight spaces. Automotive Circuit breakers Domestic appliances Electronics Magnetrons Wiring
